description: Front-end HTML file for a web-based database viewer dashboard, containing structure, styles, and embedded JavaScript for dynamic data fetching and UI interaction.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of databases from the backend API.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Handles the refresh button click to reload the list of databases.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the table list for a specific database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders a data table in HTML from fetched data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content, handling objects and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data.
